title: Calories Burned Doing Push-Ups (Per Minute, Set, and Workout)
introduction: Push-ups are great for upper-body strength and conditioning, but how many calories do they burn? Here are practical estimates by body weight, reps, and workout format.

sections.heading: 💪 Quick Answer: Push-Up Calorie Burn
sections.content:
| Body Weight | 5 Minutes (work sets) | 10 Minutes (interval style) | 20 Minutes (circuit style) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 120 lb (54 kg) | 20-35 kcal | 40-70 kcal | 80-140 kcal |
| 150 lb (68 kg) | 25-45 kcal | 50-90 kcal | 100-180 kcal |
| 180 lb (82 kg) | 30-55 kcal | 60-110 kcal | 120-220 kcal |
| 210 lb (95 kg) | 35-65 kcal | 70-130 kcal | 140-260 kcal |

Use the [Calorie Burn Calculator](/tools/calorie-burn-calculator) for full workout estimates.

sections.heading: Calories Burned Per 100 Push-Ups
sections.content:
| Body Weight | Approx Calories per 100 Reps |
| --- | --- |
| 120 lb (54 kg) | 20-35 kcal |
| 150 lb (68 kg) | 25-45 kcal |
| 180 lb (82 kg) | 30-55 kcal |
| 210 lb (95 kg) | 35-65 kcal |

Exact numbers vary by tempo, depth, and rest periods.

sections.heading: How to Increase Push-Up Workout Burn
sections.content:
Try these methods:

• Shorten rest intervals
• Add push-ups into full-body circuits
• Increase time under tension
• Pair with lower-body movements

A circuit format burns much more than isolated sets with long rests.

sections.heading: Push-Ups in a Fat-Loss Plan
sections.content:
Push-ups are best used as part of a bigger system:

| Priority | Action |
| --- | --- |
| Nutrition | Maintain a sustainable deficit |
| Training | Combine push-ups with cardio + strength |
| Tracking | Log intake and activity daily |

Use Eati to keep your calorie target, workouts, and progress in sync.

midArticleCta: Estimate full-session calorie burn with the calculator and track your intake in Eati so home workouts drive visible progress.
conclusion: Push-ups do burn calories, especially in circuit-style workouts. For best fat-loss results, pair push-ups with consistent cardio and nutrition tracking in Eati.
metaTitle: Calories Burned Doing Push-Ups: Per Rep and Workout Guide
metaDescription: Learn calories burned doing push-ups with practical tables by body weight, reps, and workout duration for fat-loss planning.

faqs.question: Do push-ups burn belly fat?
faqs.answer: Push-ups help burn calories and build muscle, but spot reduction is not possible. Fat loss comes from total calorie deficit over time.

faqs.question: How many push-ups should I do for weight loss?
faqs.answer: Use push-ups as part of full workouts 3-5 times per week, progressing volume gradually while maintaining nutrition consistency.
